title: Backpacks
body:
# Backpacks
...is a simple, no-frills backpack mod for the average adventurer. There are no upgrades, there are no fluid tanks, there is no sleeping bag. Only you, and your backpack.

## Usage

Backpacks come in two sizes: regular, and large. A regular backpack is as large as a single chest, and a large backpack is as large as a double chest. Backpacks can be placed on the ground by sneaking and right-clicking, or worn in the chest slot or the "back" slot if Curios is installed. A placed backpack can be equipped by sneaking and right clicking it. It will try to go into the "back" slot first, then the chest slot, whichever is open. If it can't be worn, nothing will happen, and you'll have to break it and pick it up.

When worn, or held in the inventory, the "first" (priority: curios > chest > top-leftmost in inventory) backpack available can be opened by pressing the Open Backpack key (default: **B**). You can also open a backpack held in your hand by right-clicking.

### Crafting Recipes

Regular Backpack
- 7x Leather
- 1x Iron Ingot
- 1x Chest

![The crafting recipe for a basic backpack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b333dec248eb94a6654613b60aaaf08933fbff2.png)

Large Backpack
- 7x Leather
- 1x Gold Ingot
- 1x Backpack

![The crafting recipe for a large backpack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80e8b4d902ca115473ba2a9ade5d094966ef25b3.png)

### License & Credits

Backpacks is licensed under the MIT license. Backpacks contains [utility code from Mekanism](https://github.com/mekanism/Mekanism/blob/1.21.x/src/main/java/mekanism/common/util/VoxelShapeUtils.java), which is licensed MIT. Backpacks visual appearance is based on the mod [copygirl's Wearable Backpacks](https://github.com/copygirl/WearableBackpacks), which is licensed MIT.
